---
title: "Detecting Misconduct in Trading Floor Communications"
subtitle: "Data Science in Financial Services · Lab Exercise"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.scss]
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    controls: true
    transition: fade
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0.08
    self-contained: true
    highlight-style: github
execute:
  echo: false
---

## {.title-slide-custom background-color="#0f1e35"}

::: {style="text-align:center; padding-top:50px;"}
[Detecting Misconduct]{style="font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:700; color:#ffffff; display:block;"}
[in Trading Floor Communications]{style="font-size:2.5rem; font-weight:700; color:#f97316; display:block; margin-bottom:24px;"}

[Data Science in Financial Services · Lab Exercise]{style="font-size:1.05rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);"}

::: {style="margin-top:36px; display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:16px; flex-wrap:wrap;"}
[🔍 Keyword Search]{.tag-pill} [🤖 AI Analysis]{.tag-pill} [📊 TradeGuard App]{.tag-pill}
:::

[Singapore Management University · MITB Programme]{style="font-size:0.85rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-top:20px; display:block;"}
:::

---

## Background {background-color="#f8fafc"}

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:40px; align-items:start; padding-top:10px;"}

::: {}
### Regulatory Context

::: {.ref-badge}
📋 **FMSB Annual Report 2017**
FICC Markets Standards Board
:::
::: {.ref-badge style="margin-top:10px;"}
🏦 **BNM Code of Conduct 2017**
Malaysian Wholesale Financial Markets
:::
::: {.ref-badge style="margin-top:10px;"}
📘 **Singapore Blue Book 2013**
Guide to Conduct & Market Practice for Treasury Activities
:::
:::

::: {}
### What Are We Detecting?

::: {.intro-block}
Trading floor communications can contain evidence of **market misconduct** — attempts to manipulate prices, share confidential information, or collude with counterparties.

Identifying these patterns at scale requires systematic techniques that go beyond manual review.
:::
:::

:::

---

## Misconduct Taxonomy {background-color="#0f1e35"}

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:14px; padding-top:10px;"}

::: {.miscon-card}
[🎯]{style="font-size:1.4rem;"} **Market Influence**
False info, staggered orders, one-way quotes, opposing trades
:::

::: {.miscon-card}
[⚡]{style="font-size:1.4rem;"} **Front-Running**
Trading ahead of large client orders
:::

::: {.miscon-card}
[📍]{style="font-size:1.4rem;"} **Mark the Market**
Small-volume trades near close to skew price
:::

::: {.miscon-card}
[🔒]{style="font-size:1.4rem;"} **Confidential Info**
Soliciting or sharing MNPI
:::

::: {.miscon-card}
[🗝️]{style="font-size:1.4rem;"} **Codewords**
Disguised language (naga, askar, tiger, strawberry…)
:::

::: {.miscon-card}
[🌐]{style="font-size:1.4rem;"} **Non-Approved Languages**
Using disallowed languages to obscure intent
:::

:::

---

## Lab 1 · Codeword Detection {background-color="#f8fafc"}

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:36px;"}

::: {}
### Technique

Excel keyword search (naga, askar, tiger) → highlight rows → manual context analysis of surrounding messages.

### Findings

::: {.finding-row style="border-color:#dc2626;"}
✅ **naga** — Confirmed misconduct: market sensitive client mandate shared
:::
::: {.finding-row style="border-color:#dc2626; margin-top:8px;"}
✅ **strawberry** — Confirmed: spoofing request ("flash a huge sell order, don't intend to trade")
:::
::: {.finding-row style="border-color:#16a34a; margin-top:8px;"}
⚠️ **dragon** — **False alarm**: refers to a known counterparty, not collusion
:::
:::

::: {}
### Limitations

::: {.limit-card}
❌ Keywords like **tiger** return zero results — exhaustive list is time-consuming
:::
::: {.limit-card style="margin-top:10px;"}
❌ High proportion of **false alarms** for common words
:::
::: {.limit-card style="margin-top:10px;"}
❌ **Labour-intensive** manual context review for every hit
:::

::: {.highlight-box style="margin-top:16px;"}
Keyword search is a useful *starting point* but not scalable for large message volumes.
:::
:::

:::

---

## Lab 2 · Soliciting Confidential Info {background-color="#0f1e35"}

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:36px; padding-top:10px;"}

::: {}
### Objective

Identify attempts to solicit (ask for, request for) **confidential / non-public information** in chat logs.

### Approach

AI tools used to generate a targeted misconduct keyword dictionary.

Excel search for phrases such as:

::: {style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-top:10px;"}
[behind the scenes]{.kw-tag} [off the record]{.kw-tag} [favor / favour]{.kw-tag} [axe]{.kw-tag} [mandate]{.kw-tag}
:::
:::

::: {}
### Keyword Dictionary Categories

::: {style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; margin-top:4px;"}
[🔴 Front Running]{.dict-row}
[🔴 Insider Trading]{.dict-row}
[🔴 Marking the Close]{.dict-row}
[🔴 Collusion & Price Fixing]{.dict-row}
[🔴 Wash Trades & Position Parking]{.dict-row}
[🔴 Spoofing]{.dict-row}
[🟡 Gifts & Entertainment]{.dict-row}
[🟡 Concealment & Ambiguous Language]{.dict-row}
[🟡 Urgency & Pressure Signals]{.dict-row}
:::
:::

:::

---

## Lab 3 · TradeGuard AI App {background-color="#f8fafc"}

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:36px; align-items:center;"}

::: {}
### What We Built

A **Google AI Studio** application — **TradeGuard** — that automates the full misconduct detection workflow:

::: {style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px; margin-top:12px;"}
::: {.feature-card}
📁 **Upload** a CSV message log for full-document analysis
:::
::: {.feature-card}
🔍 **Keyword search** with click-to-filter by category
:::
::: {.feature-card}
💬 **Context viewer** — click any result to see surrounding messages
:::
::: {.feature-card}
🤖 **AI segment analysis** — instant LLM verdict on flagged messages
:::
:::
:::

::: {style="text-align:center;"}
::: {.app-cta-box}
[🛡️]{style="font-size:3rem; display:block; margin-bottom:12px;"}
**TradeGuard AI**

Misconduct detection powered by Google AI Studio

<a href="https://ai.studio/apps/13b976f4-bce5-4f34-8b6d-2459a77b1a5b" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block; margin-top:16px; background:#f97316; color:#fff; font-weight:700; font-size:1rem; padding:12px 28px; border-radius:8px; text-decoration:none;">Launch App →</a>
:::
:::

:::

---

## Lab 3 · App Results {background-color="#0f1e35"}

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:28px; padding-top:10px;"}

::: {}
### Codeword Outcomes

::: {.result-row .positive}
✅ **naga** — True positive: client mandate leak
*"Hearing Naga might be looking to buy a lot GII next week"*
:::
::: {.result-row .positive style="margin-top:10px;"}
✅ **strawberry** — True positive: spoofing
*"Need to push the Strawberry price down… flash a huge sell order"*
:::
::: {.result-row .neutral style="margin-top:10px;"}
⚠️ **askar** — App flagged as **false alarm** correctly
Context analysis confirmed non-malicious usage
:::
:::

::: {}
### vs. Excel Keyword Search

| Dimension | Excel | TradeGuard AI |
|-----------|-------|---------------|
| Speed | Slow | Fast |
| Scale | Limited | Large volumes |
| Context | Manual | Automated |
| Accuracy | Human-dependent | AI-assisted |
| Dictionary | Static | Updateable |

:::

:::

---

## Lab 4 · Full Scan Results {background-color="#f8fafc"}

**TradeGuard AI full-document scan identified 10 high-severity violations:**

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; margin-top:10px;"}

::: {.violation-card}
[HIGH]{.sev-badge} **Insider Trading / Confidentiality**
200M client sell order disclosed — price-insensitive nature shared
:::

::: {.violation-card}
[HIGH]{.sev-badge} **Front-Running**
Immediate 10M sell placed after leaked 200M order
:::

::: {.violation-card}
[HIGH]{.sev-badge} **Collusion / Price Fixing**
Agreement to keep bid/ask spread wide on MGS 0735
:::

::: {.violation-card}
[HIGH]{.sev-badge} **Spoofing / Market Manipulation**
"Flash a huge sell order… don't intend to trade it"
:::

::: {.violation-card}
[HIGH]{.sev-badge} **Bid Rigging**
Coordinated bid levels for GII 0535 government auction
:::

::: {.violation-card}
[HIGH]{.sev-badge} **Client Mandate Leak**
500M buy mandate shared — position adjusted on leaked info
:::

:::

---

## Comparative Assessment {background-color="#0f1e35"}

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:20px; padding-top:10px;"}

::: {.assess-card}
### 🔎 Excel Keyword Search

**Strengths**
Simple, transparent, auditable

**Weaknesses**
Labour-intensive, high false alarm rate, no context awareness, doesn't scale
:::

::: {.assess-card style="border-color:#f97316;"}
### 🤖 TradeGuard AI

**Strengths**
Scalable, context-aware, AI-powered verdict, updateable dictionary

**Weaknesses**
Requires internet access, LLM can hallucinate, needs validation layer
:::

::: {.assess-card}
### ✅ Recommendation

**Hybrid approach** — keyword search as a first-pass filter, TradeGuard AI for context analysis and prioritisation of true positives.
:::

:::

::: {style="text-align:center; margin-top:24px;"}
<a href="https://ai.studio/apps/13b976f4-bce5-4f34-8b6d-2459a77b1a5b" target="_blank" style="color:#f97316; font-weight:600; text-decoration:none; font-size:1rem;">🛡️ TradeGuard AI App — try it live →</a>
:::
